prompt: 给 governance request 加一个 'Urgency' 字段（urgent/normal），在创建和编辑时可以设置。如果设为 urgent，dispatch 的时候优先级要调高，domain reviewer 的界面上也要显示 urgency badge。需要加数据库字段。

assertions.text: Produces a structured impact assessment with affected features table
Correctly classifies as L3/Medium (cross-feature, modifies existing behavior)
Correctly pauses for user review before proceeding
Identifies all affected features (governance-requests, domain-dispatch, at minimum)
Plans a database migration (ALTER TABLE or new column)
Lists specific affected acceptance criteria from existing feature docs
Documents API contract changes (request/response shape changes)
Plans both API tests and E2E tests across affected features
Plans to update feature docs with new ACs and test coverage
